## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check:encoding` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` and `npm run format:check` pass
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes (`prebuild` runs encoding + copy checks)
- [ ] `npm run validate:html` and `npm run validate:links` pass (after build)
- [ ] Playwright tests updated or run locally for behavior changes
- [ ] Visual baselines updated if UI changed intentionally (`--update-snapshots`)
- [ ] Novel bug class logged in `docs/known-issues.md` (if applicable)
